title: Accessibility
subtitle: technology for everyone!
overview: This session introduces students to Accessibility features in computers and mobile devices. Students will learn how technology helps people with different abilities use computers easily and independently.

images._note: Add screenshots of accessibility tools, classroom activities, and assistive technology examples.

activity.title: Explore Accessibility Features
steps: Open Accessibility Settings using Windows Settings
Turn ON Magnifier and zoom the screen
Use Voice Typing to write a sentence
Adjust text size for better readability
Discuss how these tools help different users

quiz.explanation: Accessibility helps all users use technology easily, including people with disabilities.

quiz.q: Which tool reads text aloud on screen?
quiz.explanation: Screen Readers help visually impaired users hear screen content.
Magnifier enlarges items on the screen for easier viewing.

quiz.q: Which feature helps users type without a physical keyboard?
quiz.explanation: On-Screen Keyboard allows typing using mouse or touch.

quiz.q: What does High Contrast Mode improve?
quiz.explanation: High Contrast makes text easier to see.

quiz.q: Which feature converts speech into text?
quiz.explanation: Voice Typing allows users to speak instead of typing.

options: To help all users use technology comfortably
quiz.explanation: Accessibility features support inclusive and equal technology access.

quiz.q: Which accessibility feature helps hearing-impaired users?
quiz.explanation: Closed Captions display spoken words as text.

quiz.q: Where can accessibility settings usually be found?
quiz.explanation: Accessibility options are available in device settings.

quiz.q: What is the purpose of Narrator?
quiz.explanation: Narrator helps users by speaking text and buttons aloud.

quiz.q: Which device is useful for voice typing?
quiz.explanation: A microphone captures voice for speech-to-text features.
Inclusive technology supports users with different needs and abilities.

quiz.q: Which feature can help users with low vision?
quiz.explanation: Magnifier enlarges content for better visibility.

quiz.q: What should students learn about accessibility?
quiz.explanation: Accessibility teaches inclusion, empathy, and equal access to technology.

quiz.q: Which accessibility feature helps reduce eye strain?
quiz.explanation: Dark Mode and High Contrast can improve comfort while viewing screens.
